Iceflame  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Piercing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 35 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Smolder (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 15.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

__DEL__1591810945052
1 post
Is this thing really worth 1500 plat? Because I must have gotten a great deal. Someone sold it to me for 200, and I wouldn't trade it for anything else. And since my piercing skill is 165, this thing hits constantly, often twice at once due to a high double attack.

Silais Makeakebab
33 Iksar Warrior

Awesome weapon!

QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2002 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1695600986541
Scholar
63 posts
Iceflame isn't half bad at all, decent mid-uppermid lvl SK or Pally weapon, especially since they don't get duel wield. Also, using currently on my warrior when i'm not duel wielding, and it's doing real well at lvl 32, although still does not proc. As a woodelf with 194 unbuffed str and and a dex of 119,it's trying to proc, but as i'm hitting anywhere from 80-130 with a mediocre piercing skill, it can only get better. Using the FBSS(after they updated it) makes this weapon a 35/34, which is far from bad... only thing is a 15WT tends to drop the stamina, and it's graphics look like ***, hehe. Iceflame is still going around 3k on Inny as I write this, so it's a reasonably priced item. Take care all, Safe Hunting.


Decimus Merideus 32 Wood Elf Warrior
Demmin N'auti 49 Dark Elf Shadowknight
Merkutio 23 Human Monk
Biiff 23 Ogre Shadowknight
Demm 34 Half Elf Druid

Proud member of the House of Isildur on Innoruuk

Nice Weapon

# Jan 20 2002 at 1:26 AM Rating: Decent

Bought one for 1.5k thats it. have 120 skill and doing better then my Arbitors. Am very happy with the price i got it for and at 51 procs 70dd about 3 times a fight. Str 167 Dex 121

iceflame
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 1:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769989901
1 post
haha someone tried to swindle my tantors tusk out of me today.. for the iceflame.. i knew the iceflame was junk to me. its similier to the thronebladed yak cept a lil faster. the person told me that the iceflame was worht way more than the tusk (lol wondered what she was smoking) but my tusk is 50/60 and some stats.. plus 25 bonus. now i hit for 250's(seen it hit for 289 in hate) b4 the bonus patch. i am happy with my tusk.
▲ Page top
RE: iceflame
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2001 at 1:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772976843
4 posts
He wasn't trying to cheat you out of anything. This and Tantor's do nearly the same damage. I think Tantor's may do like 5 dmg per min more.
▲ Page top
RE: iceflame
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2002 at 1:19 PM Rating: Default
angminas
View User Forum
155 posts
Agreed. Tantor's ratio is 1.2, while Iceflame's ratio is 1.257...and Iceflame is much faster and has a nice proc which should easily put it in front in the damage category. Like the Centi Warspear, one of the most underrated items I've ever seen, just because it uses an unpopular skill. A tough sale, but pure gold to those who know what they actually have.

Teriuk / Terriuk / Tookus
Warrior / Warrior / Druid
Morell-Thule
____________________________
Warlord Teriuk Blackarrow
Morell-Thule (Erollisi Marr)
▲ Page top
RE: iceflame
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2002 at 1:27 PM Rating: Decent
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
Ah, but Tantor's has a different use...

I will not go into the details of every use Tantor's has, but I will list a few.

Auto-Riposte Discipline for initial aggro.
Secondary Tank hits hard with low aggro.
Crit/Crip dmg multiplier greater on higher dmg weapons.
10 SV Cold and 50hps on Tantor's

And the rarity of Tantor's compared to the Iceflame is what makes Tantor's a more expensive weapon. I've seen Tantor's sell for MUCH more than the average 3k the Iceflame goes for.
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 09 2001 at 7:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTF? Verant's latest patch was supposedly gonna upgrade the 2h weapons and finally help us paladins and sk's out, i say BS! I have this weapon and yesterday i was still getting crappy hits of 31. Verant was supposed to put us on the same damage table as warriors, sorry didnt happen. Well i guess i should only be mad at myself for actually believing that those idiots at Verant were actually gonna help us out. Thanks for...well.... NOTHING Verant... you suck!
RE: 2h upgrade?
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2001 at 1:08 PM Rating: Decent
angminas
View User Forum
155 posts
Buddy, either you're a total weakling with 1 piercing skill, or there's something you're not telling us. My level 22 warrior has about 155 strength and 40 piercing, and he currently maxes out at 61, usually doing over 50 damage. Also, this thing wants to proc, bad! I helped chase down a Griffin in EC with this thing after it was already fleeing, and Iceflame tried to proc FIVE TIMES in about 30 seconds. I have about 105 dex, and my other weapons don't proc anywhere near that often! With a FBSS, the ratio drops below 1. A Sarnak Battlehammer has a higher ratio (even before the fbss), has no proc, and is warrior only, and it's worth 4-6k; I traded one for Silver Chitin Handwraps once! How valuable is Iceflame? I'm giving up 1hs for it until I find something better, which will be a long time. Weapons like this are why I started my troll with 95 dexterity. Iceflame ROCKS!
____________________________
Warlord Teriuk Blackarrow
Morell-Thule (Erollisi Marr)
▲ Page top
Heh :)
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 11:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755938326
3 posts
I was looking at this in my inventory today. I was thinking, no way that had a dmg of 35 when i bought it. I only paid 1500p, and never really used it, I was just hoping it had a nice graphic. Thanks for the upgrade Verant :) 35/44 definatily makes this a very worth while weapon. **edit** Finally got in a group where I wasnt main tank, and used this baby for a while. The whole time I was trying to figure out whose weapon was doing 66pts DD. Heh, it was my Iceflame, they upgraded the process also :) Used to be 37pt DD.

# May 07 2001 at 12:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1700439386617
7 posts
I was lucky enough to be loaned this at level 20 and have used it to keep my piercing skill up at each level since. It never proc'd until level 35 for me and at level 35 it does 54 dmg max.

IMHO the weapon is great anyway, I often hit for 80s and 90s and have done crits for 140 and 150 so far. The added proc is just the "cherry on top" for me =)

smolder goes up by 1 dmg every lvl... im at lvl 42 and its doing 60 dmg

#Anonymous, Posted: May 03 2001 at 3:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What a joke. This is a graphic of a Halbred...but its pierce? And 2 handed, so your secondary slot is disable...plus you can thorw this *******? Gimmie a break...it has 15.0WT...it has to be Giant or Large in size, no way the range should be 40. This is either fake or Verant is off its rocker. They should make the items semi-realistic.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 03 2001 at 7:06 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Note to the above person....This is a fantasy world...the words realistic don't belong here =). also, we all have known for a while that Verant is staffed by insane giraffes...so why is this such a shock to you?

54 Wanderer
Cazic-Thule
▲ Page top
RE: Smolder
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 6:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750754345
10 posts
Because, when the person who posted the picture of this item the patch was not out that had the information if it was tiny, small, medium, large or huge. The patch that had that extra thing was not made until recently and if your going to say that this was just posted up a couple of days ago (the information and picture about this weapon) the person probably already had taken a screenshot of it before the patch and saw that it was not in Allakhazam's listing.

Yup, yup. 2 handed piercing was implemented for paladins, although they seem to be including warriors and Shadowknights as well.

Too bad Rgues can't use 2 handed piercing, but it doesn't seem there forte anyway.

weapon
QuoteReply
# May 02 2001 at 8:01 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The 2hpiercing was implimented a while back to allow paladins more weapons to use. The proc 'smolder' is a fire based DD.

# May 02 2001 at 7:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757089218
9 posts
I've never heard of 2H Piercing as a skill...Is that something new?
▲ Page top
RE: 2H Piercing??
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 11:46 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have the Messenger of the Queen on my Paladin. the 2Hand Pierce is just so you can't populate both hand slots while using thie weapon. The character still only raises skill in Piercing as a result of using this waepon. There is no 2H Pierce to train in. Both 2H and 1H pierce are effected by the Piercing skill.
▲ Page top
RE: 2H Piercing??
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 12:02 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Paladins can also use the Harpoon of The Depths and The Crystal Face Grinder, both are 1h Piercing with decent stats.
